case_title: TD BANK USA N.A. VS. HEIDI GALINDO ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100096454) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 15
MINI MINUTES FOR FEB-25-2020 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA N.A. AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO TARGET NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT GALINDO, HEIDI DOES 1 TO 15 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-24-2019
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-25-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DECLARATION / AFFIDAVIT IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT (CCP 585) (TRANSACTION ID # 100096454) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA N.A. AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO TARGET NATIONAL BANK

COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED ($.00 ON INTEREST, $.00 ON PRINCIPAL), $470.73 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS, (TRANSACTION ID # 77610526) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA N.A. AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO TARGET NATIONAL BANK
DECLARATION FOR REIMBURSEMENT OF COSTS (CCP 1033) (TRANSACTION ID # 100096454) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA N.A. AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO TARGET NATIONAL BANK

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $331.45 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $1,289.21 (TRANSACTION ID # 100096454) AS TO DEFENDANT GALINDO, HEIDI

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 63255972), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA N.A. AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO TARGET NATIONAL BANK SERVED FEB-05-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE FEB-05-2019 AS TO DEFENDANT GALINDO, HEIDI

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA N.A. AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO TARGET NATIONAL BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GALINDO, HEIDI $507.50 PRINCIPAL, $331.45 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $838.95, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100096454)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-25-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
